description: Use this API to impose generation/load at the given time point on profile curves. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = imposeprofile(profilename,options,chaarg, dfaxfile, infile)

parameters.name: profilename
parameters.description: Is the name of the profile. (input).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of 2 elements specifying integer options. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: dfaxfile
parameters.description: Name of the distribution factor data file (input; no default allowed). (input).

parameters.name: infile
parameters.description: Name of the unit inertia and governor data file (input; blank by default). (input).

error_codes.description: Topology error: bus(es) with bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
No profile curves defined in profile curve set.
Time point not found in the profile curve set.
Too many islands in base case.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE 25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
monitored elements exceed limit when adding multi-section line members.
Error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
Error opening Unit Inertia and Governor Data File.
Prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
